text:
Hi
Dmitry Marakasov $B$5$s$O=q$-$^$7$?(B (2010/09/16 9:18):
> Please check out this version after my minor changes - mainly canonical
> order of statements, whitespace and removal of some unneeded stuff.
Thank you.

> The main issue is MAINTAINER= - we don't accept unmaintained ports, you
> should put your email there and become a maintainer. If that's ok
> with you, I can commit that right away.
Please make your choice.
:-)


--
